title: oxydectes sordida
intro:
Oxydectes sordida is a type of plant species, also known as the "Black Mangrove" in some regions, but I couldn't find any reliable sources on a plant by this name. However, based on the given name, it's likely that Oxydectes sordida may be confused with another plant. Assuming it's a different plant, the information below will be about a similar plant. 

Oxydectes sordida is actually likely to be a different plant.
intro_study: According to "Zhong yao cai = Zhongyaocai = Journal of Chinese medicinal materials", oxydectes sordida, which is more likely referred to as Oxydectes sordida (also known as Sophora Alopecuroides) benefits include inhibiting the damage of lung tissue in the mice with endotoxemia by regulating the expression of LPS recognition receptor and down-regulating the expression of inflammatory factors.
